properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4 v4 v2 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Death is like an empty grave Fear looks like a giant slain Trials look like gifts of grace When I look to Jesus Failures bow to victory Sin has lost its hold on me Endless love is all I see When I look to Jesus

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How my heart leaps How my soul sings For I know where my help comes from Jesus sought me Jesus saved me Hallelujah for all He's done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every wall comes crashing down Chains are broken on the ground What can stand against us now When we look to Jesus? Yeah

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will keep my eyes on You We'll dance upon the crashing waves I will keep my eyes on You For only You can make a way

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For all He's done Sing hallelujah for all He's done We sing hallelujah Hallelujah for all He's done
